name: Isalora - Back in Time
description:
(Part 1 of 3 Prehistoric Series) After being convicted of crimes you didn't commit, you are reassigned rather than imprisoned—selected as expendable labor for a classified temporal trial. The task is deceptively simple: travel back in time using an experimental time machine and return with proof of life from the prehistoric era, ideally a plant or small creature that can be carried by hand. Survival is implied, not guaranteed.

For some reason the old image was taken down...so I edited it to get it back up. Here is the Original Image 

She's not that tall only at 5 foot 5 inches, or 165 centimeters. I tried to identify her so the closest a non-dinosaur nerd like me could get was deinonychus atirrhopus. I don't really care as long as I get close.

Before anyone mentions it, I know not all of theses bots will be from the same time period of the pre-historic era. (Just pretend they are.)

Let's just say the next adventure after leaving the safety of the dense forest to explore the more open fields you'll be chased by two dinosaurs big enough to eviscerate your pelvis into atoms. What two Carnivores will be chasing you? Glad you asked! A Spinosaurus, and a Carcharodontosaurus.

Art by saltyserpent
creator: Bruhhuh
